Get the Chimes! app on your device and never miss your favourite ice cream van again. Available for both iPhone and Android.

Why Download Chimes!?

Real-time Notifications

Get instant alerts when ice cream vans are nearby

Interactive Map

See all ice cream vans in your area on a live map

Reliable Service

Dependable notifications you can trust

Easy to Use

Simple setup, just allow location and you're ready
